build_a_creativity_research_matters_grap.label: Source corpus for the initial creativity research graph is selected
Candidate creativity research matters are extracted from the corpus
Human reviewer accepts the proposed matters and dependencies for persistence

build_a_review_workflow_for_creativity_r.label: Source context required for each creativity research claim is defined
Evidence quality and transfer limits required for each claim are defined
Human acceptance step before persistence is documented

identify_creativity_practices_with_repea.label: Relevant sources across education, business, and public institutions are collected
Evidence type and repeatability threshold are defined
Accepted practices are listed with source context and limits

map_creativity_interventions_to_measurab.label: Candidate interventions are linked to source-backed findings
Outcome measures are defined for each intervention
Human reviewer accepts the intervention-to-outcome map

make_creativity_findings_reusable_as_sli.label: Accepted creativity findings are selected for slide reuse
Each selected finding has source context and evidence limits
At least one reusable slide atom is drafted from an accepted finding

connect_accepted_creativity_findings_to_.label: Accepted findings have stable matter ids
Reusable slide atom ids or file paths are recorded
Dependencies between findings and slide atoms are reviewed

review_notes: This is an exported proposal only; it has not been written to the live matters state.
Two dependencies reference existing matters in the live state: build_general_purpose_web_research_agent and setup_creativity_findings_slide_pipeline.
The next human decision is whether to persist this proposal, edit it, or use it as a starting point for a richer extraction pass.
